question: I want to spend a nice afternoon out. Where in the city has clean air, something interesting to see, and parking available?

execution_plan.reasoning: DECOMPOSE: find zones with clean air (air_quality sensors with low readings), open attractions, and free parking spots | MAP: smart-environment-and-temperature-sensors-mock / GET /sensor (filter sensorType=air_quality), smart-tourist-attractions-mock / GET /attraction (filter status=open), smart-parking-mock / GET /parking-spot (filter status=free) | CHAIN: SQL join on zoneId to find intersection of zones satisfying all three conditions | FILTER: sensorType=air_quality, status=open, status=free | VALIDATE: ✓ one filter per request respected, ✓ SQL used for multi-condition intersection

input.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT a.zoneId, AVG(s.lastReading) AS avg_air_quality, COUNT(DISTINCT att.id) AS attraction_count, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS parking_count FROM get_air_quality_sensors s JOIN get_open_attractions att ON s.zoneId = att.zoneId JOIN get_free_parking p ON s.zoneId = p.zoneId GROUP BY a.zoneId ORDER BY avg_air_quality ASC, attraction_count DESC, parking_count DESC
